title: LOOKING GLASS RURAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: RURAL PROGRAM LOOKING GLASS RURAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in center with access to food, clothing, and other vital resources. Provides case management services to assist youth in finding and maintaining stable housing. Also helps with employment including resume preparation, job skills training, and connections to employment opportunities. 620 E Whiteaker Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Youth ages 11-21 who are homeless, runaways, or at risk of becoming homeless Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 767-3823 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 767-3823 Main phone Main phone (541) 767-3823 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Cottage Grove Services: Case/Care Management * Homeless Youth Food Pantries * Homeless Youth General Clothing Provision * Homeless Youth Homeless Drop In Centers * At Risk Youth Street Outreach Programs Youth Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
